title: Scale all service Deployments to 2 replicas and create HPAs for 5 services
subtasks: Update all service Deployment manifests in helm/sigma1/ to set replicas: 2 (except Morgan which stays at 1).

Create HorizontalPodAutoscaler manifests for equipment-catalog (min=2, max=8, CPU=70%), rms (min=2, max=6, CPU=70%), finance (min=2, max=4, CPU=70%), customer-vetting (min=2, max=4, CPU=70%), and social-engine (min=2, max=4, CPU=70%).
Apply changes and verify all pods are running with the correct replica count.
Check HPAs are created and targeting the correct CPU utilization.

title: Scale CNPG PostgreSQL cluster to 2 instances with WAL archival to R2
subtasks: Update the CloudNativePG Cluster CR to instances: 2 (1 primary + 1 replica).
Enable WAL archival to the sigma1-wal-archive R2 bucket using the barmanObjectStore configuration.
Verify streaming replication is active and replication lag is within acceptable bounds.
Confirm WAL segment files are being written to the R2 bucket.

title: Scale Valkey to 2 replicas
subtasks: Update the Valkey Deployment or StatefulSet manifest to replicas: 2.
If Valkey supports primary/replica mode, configure replication; otherwise, run 2 independent instances behind a service.
Update the sigma1-infra-endpoints ConfigMap VALKEY_URL to point to the primary service if needed.
Apply and verify both pods are Running.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for equipment-catalog service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for the equipment-catalog namespace/pod selector.
Allow ingress only from morgan, blaze-website, and mobile-app pods.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and the R2 endpoint CIDR/FQDN.
Deny all other traffic by default.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for RMS service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for the rms pod selector.
Allow ingress only from morgan and equipment-catalog pods.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and Google Calendar API FQDN.
Deny all other traffic by default.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for finance service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for the finance pod selector.
Allow ingress only from morgan and rms pods.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and Stripe API FQDN.
Deny all other traffic by default.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for customer-vetting service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for the customer-vetting pod selector.
Allow ingress only from morgan and rms.
Allow egress only to postgres, valkey, and the external API FQDNs: OpenCorporates, LinkedIn, Google APIs.
Deny all other traffic by default.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for social-engine service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for the social-engine pod selector.
Allow ingress only from morgan.
Allow egress to postgres, valkey, R2 endpoint, and the external social/AI API FQDNs: Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Facebook, OpenAI.
Deny all other traffic by default.

title: Author CiliumNetworkPolicy for Morgan service
subtasks: Create a CiliumNetworkPolicy for the Morgan pod selector.
Allow ingress from cloudflared pods (Cloudflare Tunnel) and any web clients arriving through the tunnel.
Allow egress to all 5 backend services, signal-cli pod, and the external FQDNs: ElevenLabs, Twilio.
Deny ingress from arbitrary internet IPs (only cloudflared terminates external traffic).

title: Deploy cloudflared Cloudflare Tunnel and configure ingress routing
subtasks: Deploy a cloudflared Deployment (1 replica) in the sigma1 namespace.
Configure the tunnel to expose morgan-chat-svc:3000 → chat.sigma1.com and signal webhook → signals.sigma1.com.
Store the tunnel credentials as a Kubernetes Secret.
Enforce HTTPS-only at the Cloudflare dashboard.
Ensure all services use ClusterIP only (no NodePort or LoadBalancer).

title: Implement per-service RBAC: ServiceAccounts, Roles, and automountServiceAccountToken disabled
subtasks: Create a dedicated ServiceAccount for each of the 6 service Deployments.
Create a Role per service with least-privilege rules (read own secrets via projected volumes only).
Remove default ServiceAccount auto-mount from all non-ArgoCD pods by setting automountServiceAccountToken: false on each Deployment pod spec.
Update each Deployment to use its dedicated ServiceAccount.

title: Create secret rotation CronJob and ops runbook
subtasks: Create a Kubernetes CronJob named secret-rotation-reminder that runs monthly (schedule: '0 9 1 * *').
The job logs a rotation reminder message to stdout (picked up by Loki) listing all secrets requiring rotation: stripe, opencorporates, linkedin, google, elevenlabs, twilio, openai, cloudflare.
Write the rotation runbook at ops/runbooks/secret-rotation.md with step-by-step instructions for manual rotation and deployment restart.

title: Create ArgoCD Application CRs for all services with automated sync and rollback alerting
subtasks: Create an ArgoCD Application CR for each of the 6 services (equipment-catalog, rms, finance, customer-vetting, social-engine, morgan) pointing to helm/sigma1/ in the Git repo.
Enable automated sync with selfHeal: true and prune: true.
Add a Loki alert rule that fires when any Application has 3+ consecutive sync failures.

title: Create GitHub Actions pr-review.yml workflow with Stitch code review integration
subtasks: Create .github/workflows/pr-review.yml that triggers on pull_request events (opened, synchronize).
The workflow calls Stitch to perform code review using github_get_pull_request and github_get_pull_request_files, then posts the review as a PR comment.
Store STITCH_API_TOKEN in GitHub Actions secrets.
Ensure the workflow is advisory only and does not block merges.

title: Create GitHub Actions quality.yml workflow with Cleo linting for all language stacks
subtasks: Create .github/workflows/quality.yml that triggers on pull_request.
Run Cleo-driven linting: clippy + rustfmt for Rust services, eslint + biome.js for Node/TypeScript services, go vet + golangci-lint for Go services.
Fail the workflow if any linter reports errors.
